title: The State of Sport in Africa — Edition 1
excerpt: The first edition of AfricanSTN's flagship report examining the current state of sport across the African continent — covering governance, infrastructure, commercial development, and the role of technology in shaping the future of African sport.
body:
## The State of Sport in Africa — Edition 1

This is the first edition of AfricanSTN's flagship report on the state of sport across the African continent.

The report provides a comprehensive overview of the African sport landscape, examining the key factors shaping sport development, commercialisation, and technology adoption across the region.

Download the full report using the link below.
